message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #333333
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  BoxBorderColor #333333
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF7CC
  NoteBorderColor #C9B458
}

participant ConfigurationClassPostProcessor as CCP
participant ConfigurationClassParser as CCPa
participant ComponentScanAnnotationParser as CSAP
participant AdviceModeImportSelector as AMIS
participant TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector as TMCS
participant ConfigurationClass as CC
participant ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader as CCBDR
participant AutoProxyRegistrar as APR
participant AopConfigUtils as ACU

CCP -> CCP : postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry
CCP -> CCPa : parse(AnnotationMetadata metadata,\nString beanName)
activate CCPa
CCPa -> CCPa : processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)
CCPa -> CCPa : doProcessConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass,\nSourceClass sourceClass)

alt 当前解析的类Class上有@ComponentScan注解，进行扫描
  CCPa -> CSAP : parse(AnnotationAttributes componentScan,\nfinal String declaringClass)
  activate CSAP
  CSAP -> CSAP : parse(String className,\nString beanName)
  CSAP --> CCPa : processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)\n递归解析扫描到的类
  deactivate CSAP
end

CCPa -> CCPa : processImports(configClass, sourceClass,\ngetImports(sourceClass), true)

group 解析处理@EnableTransactionManagement import bean相关
  CCPa -> TMCS : selectImports(AnnotationMetadata)
  activate TMCS
  TMCS -> AMIS : selectImports(AdviceMode)
  activate AMIS
  AMIS --> TMCS
  deactivate AMIS
  TMCS --> CCPa
  deactivate TMCS

  note left of CCPa
    获取到AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
  end note

  group 注册处理AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    note left of CCPa
      通过AutoProxyRegistrar、AspectJAutoProxyRegistrar引入Bean\n（最终把@EnableTransactionManagement的类\n的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar注册到容器）
    end note
    CCPa -> CC : addImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar
    CCPa -> CCPa : processConfigurationClass
    note left of CCPa
      按照普通配置类处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    end note
  end
end

group 加载配置类的Bean定义
  CCPa -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitions
  activate CCBDR
  CCBDR -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitionsForConfigurationClass
  CCBDR -> CCBDR : registerBeanDefinitionForImportedConfigurationClass

  note right of CCBDR
    如果是由配置类导入的，直接注册到beanFactory
  end note

  group 处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration，导入了BeanFactoryTransactionAttributeSourceAdvisor
    CCBDR -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitionsForBeanMethod
    note left of CCBDR
      加载@Bean标记的方法为Bean
    end note
    CCBDR -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitionsFromImportedResources
    note left of CCBDR
      处理@ImportResource
    end note
  end

  group 处理AutoProxyRegistrar，注册了InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
    note left of CCBDR
      处理@Import，导入的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar
    end note
    CCBDR -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitionsFromRegistrars
    CCBDR -> APR : registerBeanDefinitions
    activate APR
    note right of APR
      注册InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
    end note
    APR -> ACU : registerAutoProxyCreatorIfNecessary
    deactivate APR
  end

  deactivate CCBDR
end

deactivate CCPa
@enduml
